name: FRESH CORN GRITS with SWISS CHARD and ROASTED CHERRY TOMATOES

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon plus 2 teaspoons extra-virgin olive oil
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon plus 2 teaspoons extra-virgin olive oil

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon plus 1¾ teaspoons coarse sea salt
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon plus 1¾ teaspoons coarse sea salt

ingredients.item: 12 ounces Swiss chard, stemmed and cut into bite-size pieces
ingredients.original: 12 ounces Swiss chard, stemmed and cut into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Kernels from 2 large ears of sweet corn (store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)
ingredients.original: Kernels from 2 large ears of sweet corn (store the cobs in the freezer to make Corn Broth)

ingredients.item: ½ cup finely diced yellow onion
ingredients.original: ½ cup finely diced yellow onion

ingredients.item: ¼ cup packed minced flat-leaf parsley
